description_long: This is a lifelike model of a domestic cat with a robust, rounded body and short legs, sitting upright with its tail extended behind. The cat's fur is predominantly white, interspersed with large black and orange patches, characteristic of a calico pattern. Its face is expressive, with alert, forward-facing ears, round eyes, and a slightly protruding snout. The surface texture mimics the appearance of fur, with visible sculpted lines and a matte finish. The tail is thick and straight, extending outward from the body. No collar or accessories are present, and the overall form is solid and compact, suitable for urban environments.
description: A realistic, sitting calico cat with white, black, and orange fur patches, alert ears, and a straight tail. The surface is textured to resemble fur and the body is compact and rounded.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the cat's face, chest, and left foreleg, with clear visibility of the orange and black patches on the head and body.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back, tail, and the distribution of black and orange patches across the back and tail.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the right side of the back and tail, with more black fur visible and the tail extending outward.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the cat's face, right foreleg, and chest, with a prominent black patch on the right side and orange markings on the head.
attribute_fur_pattern: calico with white, black, and orange patches
